TextRun.Text: 1. above all 最重要的是 after all 毕竟，终究
(a) panic 处在恐慌之中 Don't panic/be panicked. 不要恐慌
3. in life-threatening situations 在威胁生命的情况下
threat 受到威胁 a threat
8. be/get in (good) shape 保持身材/保持健康
be/get out of shape 身体不好/变形 in the shape of... 以...形状
You can shape your own future. (shape v. 塑造，决定...形成；影响...发展)
10. compete v. 竞争 compete for...为...竞争 compete in...在...中竞争
competition n. 竞争 competitive adj. 竞争性的 competitor n. 竞争者

RichText.Text: 1. above all 最重要的是 after all 毕竟，终究 2. panic v./n. 恐慌，惊恐 （panic-panicked-panicked） be in (a) panic 处在恐慌之中 Don't panic/be panicked. 不要恐慌 3. in life-threatening situations 在威胁生命的情况下 threaten v. 威胁 threat n. 威胁 be under threat 受到威胁 a threat to 对...威胁 4. burst into tears burst out crying 突然大哭 （burst-burst-burst） burst into laughter burst out laughing 突然大笑 5. in honor/memory of ... 为纪念... 6. be named after... 被以...命名 name...after... 以...命名 7. lose weight 减肥 put on weight 增肥，长胖 weigh v. 称重，权衡 8. be/get in (good) shape 保持身材/保持健康 be/get out of shape 身体不好/变形 in the shape of... 以...形状 You can shape your own future. (shape v. 塑造，决定...形成；影响...发展) 9. achieve seemingly impossible goals 实现看似不可能的目标 10. compete v. 竞争 compete for...为...竞争 compete in...在...中竞争 competition n. 竞争 competitive adj. 竞争性的 competitor n. 竞争者
